themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are advancing policies that prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social services, housing, and welfare. This theme appears prominently in Spain, Italy, and France, with Vox, Lega, and Rassemblement National leading the charge, often in coalition negotiations with center-right parties.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposes 'national priority' in Andalusia elections, demanding residency and social security contributions for aid access.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega proposes banning joint bank accounts to combat financial gender inequality, prioritizing women's direct salary payments.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Jordan Bardella advocates for welfare reforms prioritizing French citizens, criticizing current system's inequalities.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox pressures PP in Balearic Islands to repatriate unaccompanied migrant minors and cut NGO funding facilitating immigration.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government accelerates evictions to protect landlords from illegal occupations, favoring property owners.

themes.title: Trump’s Iran war dominates global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing media in the US, Italy, Poland, and the UK are intensely focused on Trump's military actions against Iran, framing it as a decisive move to counter Iranian aggression. The coverage often highlights Trump's threats to bomb Iran and the economic impact of the conflict, with parallel reactions from European far-right leaders.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump threatens bombing if Iran doesn’t reopen Strait of Hormuz; pauses 'Project Freedom' amid reported deal.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni prepares to meet US Secretary Rubio to discuss Iran war, balancing diplomacy amid Trump's criticisms of Pope Leo XIV.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media covers US-Iran tensions, highlighting Poland's role in NATO exercises near Kaliningrad.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage and Reform UK criticize UK's stance on Iran war, aligning with Trump's hardline position.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Bardella criticizes US policy in Iran war, calling Trump's goals erratic and warning of US entanglement.

themes.title: Meloni’s government longevity sparks cross-national debate
themes.blurb: Giorgia Meloni's long-lasting government in Italy is a focal point in right-wing and far-right media across Europe, with debates on its achievements, failures, and comparisons to historical authoritarian regimes. The coverage spans Italy, Germany, France, Poland, and Hungary, often highlighting internal party dynamics and Meloni's diplomatic maneuvers.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government faces criticism for financial mismanagement and lack of direction, despite EU commitments.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD criticizes Merz's coalition for economic failures and excessive spending, comparing it to Meloni's governance.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Bardella and Le Pen discuss Meloni's economic policies, contrasting them with RN's proposed reforms.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media analyzes Meloni's diplomatic strategies, particularly her handling of US-Italy relations.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungarian media debates Meloni's government longevity, comparing it to Orbán's long-term rule and its implications for EU relations.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties are gaining traction in polls and elections across Europe, with significant coverage in Germany, France, Sweden, Norway, and the UK. The theme highlights electoral successes, internal party conflicts, and the normalization of far-right rhetoric in mainstream politics.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads in polls for Saxony-Anhalt state elections, with 25% support for an AfD chancellor.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Le Pen and Bardella lead polls for 2027 French presidential election, with RN projected to win runoff.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD faces backlash for manipulating parliamentary voting rules, sparking debates on democratic norms.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP gains support in Norway, with polls showing potential to become the largest mayoral party.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK poised for major gains in UK local elections, threatening Labour and Conservative strongholds.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations are plaguing far-right governments and parties in Argentina, Spain, and Hungary, with high-profile figures facing judicial scrutiny. The theme highlights internal divisions, public backlash, and the impact of scandals on political stability and public trust.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni faces investigation for alleged illicit enrichment, with $752,000 in unexplained spending.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox faces internal defections and accusations of nepotism, with councilors resigning over leadership issues.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungarian oligarch Balásy Gyula surrenders assets amid corruption allegations, sparking debates on wealth taxes.
